context.code: function Counter(){ const [count, setCount] = useState(0); return <button onClick={() => setCount(count + 1)}>{count}</button>; }

segments.text: 这里用 use state 维护 count
然后 set count 触发 render

context.code: type UserCardProps = { userName: string; onSelect(): void }; export function UserCard(props: UserCardProps){ return <button onClick={props.onSelect}>{props.userName}</button>; }
context.runtimeOutput: TypeError: props.onSelect is not a function

segments.text: 先定义 user card props 类型
这里 on select 要从 props 传进来
如果不是 function 就会报 type error

context.code: const canSeek = durationMs > 0; const label = isPlaying ? 'Pause playback' : 'Resume playback';

segments.text: 这里先判断 can seek 是否可用
Then we switch the label from pause playback to resume playback
这一段是回放控制条的状态切换

context.code: const postProcessor = createHuggingFaceSubtitlePostProcessor({ model: resolveSubtitlePostProcessorModel() }); await postProcessor.process({ track, context: postProcessorContext });

segments.text: 这里创建 hugging face 字幕 post processor
模型 id 从环境变量里 resolve 出来
最后 process track 生成 corrections 和 chapters

context.code: const disposable = editor.onDidChangeModelContent(() => flushPending()); producer.takeSnapshot();

segments.text: monaco 的 on did change model content 会触发
我们不要立刻写事件 而是 flush pending
seek 的时候靠 take snapshot 恢复编辑器状态

context.code: scheduler.seek(targetTimeMs); media.currentTime = targetTimeMs / 1000;

segments.text: 回放调度器这里要走 sick
target time ms 是毫秒 但是 video current time 是秒
所以章节跳转也复用 scheduler seek

context.code: await store.saveWithChapters(track, chapters); await store.loadChapters(recordingId);

segments.text: 字幕和 chapter 要一起保存到 index db
如果 put 的时候 quota exceeded 就不要污染原来的 track
回放打开时再按 recording id load chapters

context.code: export const routerBasename = normalizeRouterBasename(import.meta.env.BASE_URL);

segments.text: vite 里面 base url 来自 import meta env base url
我们 normalize router base name 兼容 github pages
这样本地开发和部署路径都不会错

context.code: :root { --color-background: 0 0% 100%; } [data-theme='dark'] { --color-background: 220 20% 8%; }

segments.text: tail wind 的颜色不要写死 要走 css variables
切到 data theme dark 的时候 background token 会变
组件只消费语义色 这样暗色模式更稳定

context.code: return findings.length === 0 ? 'No blocking findings.' : formatFindings(findings);

segments.text: 这一段我们先看 repo guard 的 findings
If there are no blocking findings we can keep the PR moving
否则 format findings 后逐条修复

context.code: await page.goto('/replay/recording-1'); await expect(page.getByRole('button', { name: /生成字幕/ })).toBeVisible();

segments.text: play right 先 page go to 回放页
然后用 get by role 找生成字幕按钮
如果 locator click 超时就看 trace

context.code: const process = vi.fn(() => deferred.promise); await waitFor(() => expect(screen.getByText('useState hook')).toBeInTheDocument());
context.runtimeOutput: AssertionError: expected spy to be called once

segments.text: vit test 这里用 vi fn 模拟异步 process
wait for 会等 use state hook 渲染出来
spy 没调用时断言会失败

context.code: worker.postMessage({ id, type: 'process', input }); worker.addEventListener('message', handleWorkerMessage);

segments.text: 这里把 subtitle post processor 放到 web worker 里
主线程只 post message 发送 process 请求
取消时用 abort controller 返回 abort error

context.code: const pipelineOptions = [{ device: 'webgpu', dtype: 'q4f16' }, { device: 'wasm', dtype: 'q8' }];
context.runtimeOutput: Error: WebGPU is not available in this browser

segments.text: 优先走 web gpu 的 q4 f16
浏览器不支持时 fallback 到 wasm q8
transformers js 会重新加载可用的 pipeline

context.code: const workerModule = await import('monaco-editor/esm/vs/editor/editor.worker?worker'); return new workerModule.default();

segments.text: vite 里面 worker 要用问号 worker 导入
dynamic import 返回 worker module
然后 new default 创建 monaco worker

context.code: const postProcessor = useMemo(() => createWorkerBackedHuggingFaceSubtitlePostProcessor({ model }), [model]);

segments.text: react 这里用 use memo 缓存 post processor
model 不变就不要重复创建实例
后面的 use effect 负责提前 warm up

context.code: type WorkerResponse<T> = { id: string; type: 'success'; result: T } | { id: string; type: 'error'; error: SerializedError };
context.runtimeOutput: TS2339: Property 'result' does not exist on type WorkerResponse<T>

segments.text: type script 泛型这里定义 worker response
success 分支才有 result 字段
没收窄类型就会报 ts 二三三九

context.code: <div className="flex max-h-32 min-h-0 flex-col gap-1 overflow-y-auto overscroll-contain pr-1">

segments.text: 字幕列表要保留 overflow y auto
overscroll contain 可以避免滚轮影响外层
max h 三十二限制字幕区域高度

context.code: const tx = db.transaction(['subtitle-tracks', 'subtitle-chapters'], 'readwrite'); await Promise.all([tracks.put(track), chapters.put(record)]);

segments.text: index db 保存字幕和 chapters 要放同一个 transaction
save with chapters 失败时 transaction 会 abort
这样不会写出半份 subtitle chapters

context.code: const comments = await client.listIssueComments(owner, repo, pullNumber); const guardReport = findLatestRepoGuardReport(comments);

segments.text: repo guard 会在 github actions 里评论
我们用 list issue comments 找最新 guard report
缺少 git nexus impact summary 就补上

context.code: if (chapter.startMs < previousEnd || endMs <= chapter.startMs || endMs > durationMs) return { warning: 'chapters must be ordered and non-overlapping' };

segments.text: chapter 的 start ms 不能小于 previous end
end ms 也不能超过 duration ms
校验通过后 subtitle chapter list 才能渲染

context.code: env.useCustomCache = true; env.customCache = { async put(key, response) { await cache.put(key, response.clone()); } };
context.runtimeOutput: Unable to add response to browser cache: UnknownError

segments.text: hugging face transformers js 会写 browser cache
cache api 报 unknown error 时不要中断加载
custom cache 里用 response clone 后安静失败

context.code: const recorder = new MediaRecorder(stream, { mimeType }); recorder.ondataavailable = (event) => chunks.push(event.data);

segments.text: media recorder 会把 audio track 录进 blob
on data available 时收集每个 chunk
后面生成字幕就读取这个 media blob

context.code: onValueChange={(value) => onSeek(value[0] ?? currentTimeMs)} disabled={!canSeek}

segments.text: 进度条变化时调用 on seek
value 为空就回退到 current time ms
后处理字幕时也不能阻塞 progress slider

context.code: worker.addEventListener('error', handleWorkerError); pending.reject(deserializeWorkerError(response.error));
context.runtimeOutput:
Error: LLM 输出中未找到 JSON 对象
    at extractJsonObjectText
glossary: LLM 输出中未找到 JSON 对象

segments.text: worker error 要反序列化回主线程
如果 llm 输出中未找到 json 对象就 reject pending
ui 只展示错误 不要覆盖原始字幕

context.code: if (!Array.isArray(value.chapters)) throw new Error('teacher result chapters are required'); validateTeacherChapters(value.chapters, timeline);

segments.text: schema 会校验 teacher result 的 chapters
validate teacher chapters 确保时间在 timeline 内
这样 json l 训练数据不会污染模型

context.code: "quality:precommit": "npm test && npm run build:schema && npm run lint:web && npm run test:web && npm run build"

segments.text: 提交前要跑 quality pre commit
它会依次跑 npm test lint web 和 test web
github actions 失败时先看 lifecycle script

context.code: const startAtMs = Number(searchParams.get('t') ?? 0); scheduler.seek(startAtMs);

segments.text: react router 读取 search params 里的 t
转成 start at ms 后调用 scheduler seek
分享链接就能定位到指定时间点

context.code: pipelinePromise ??= loadPipeline().catch((error) => { pipelinePromise = null; throw error; });
context.runtimeOutput: NetworkError when attempting to fetch resource

segments.text: 模型 lazy load 时复用 pipeline promise
加载失败要把 promise 置空方便 retry
warm up 不应该阻塞回放主流程

context.code: const result = await postRequest({ type: 'process', input }, signal); setStatus('post-processing');

segments.text: code tape 的 post processing 要放到 web worker
这样 llm inference 不会卡住 main thread playback
结果回来后再一次性更新 subtitle track
